description: Mid-sized format and restraint fixture for comparing instruction-following cleanliness across lanes.

messages.content: You are precise and literal. Do not add commentary. Return only the requested JSON object.

Read these notes and return exactly one JSON object with keys in this order: phrase, owner, retry_window, escalation. Notes: verification phrase is ember glass orbit. Ticket owner is Maya Chen. Retry window is 7 minutes. Escalation path is pager-b. Do not add markdown, bullets, or explanation.

expected.notes: Useful for checking whether a lane follows exact output-shape instructions without wrapper text, markdown, or extra chatter.
